notes: Master registry of Lithuanian STR (Statybos techninis reglamentas) regulations.
Drives e-TAR ingestion (python-be-e6n.9 scraper) and Epic 3 multi-agent routing.
FIELD: last_amended_year — extracted from the trailing year in the STR code (e.g. 'STR 2.02.01:2004' -> 2004).
Known limitation: this is the ORIGINAL publication year encoded in the code, not necessarily the latest amendment.
Many STRs have been amended multiple times since publication; the real 'last amended' date can only be obtained from e-TAR metadata during scraping (python-be-e6n.9).
FIELD: etar_url — best-effort. Real e-TAR URLs follow https://www.e-tar.lt/portal/lt/legalAct/<UUID>.
Where the act UUID is not known, the field is set to null. Fabricated UUIDs would mislead the scraper, so we keep it null and rely on etar_search_query.
FIELD: agent_routing — name of the Stage-3 specialized agent that owns the regulation:
general, fire_safety, sanitary, energy, structural, engineering_systems.
FIELD: area — coarse domain tag, used by the orchestrator to group regulations independently of agent_routing.
FIELD: category — preserved from compliance.config.json (administrative, essential_requirements, performance, buildings, structures, engineering_systems).
